🤖 Agent Templates

Pre-built OpenClaw agent configurations for common business roles. Copy, customize, deploy.

How to Use

Each template includes four files that configure an AI agent's personality, knowledge, and behavior:

  • SOUL.md — Personality, expertise, communication style, and boundaries
  • USER.md — Information about the human the agent works with (fill in your details)
  • MEMORY.md — Long-term knowledge: contacts, accounts, procedures, reference data
  • HEARTBEAT.md — Proactive check schedule: what to monitor and when to alert

Copy any template into your OpenClaw workspace, fill in the [placeholders], and your agent is ready to go.

💰

Finance Agent

A meticulous CFO assistant. Tracks cash position, AR/AP aging, financial reporting, month-end close, and budget variance. Conservative with numbers, proactive with alerts.

SOUL.md USER.md MEMORY.md HEARTBEAT.md
⚙️

Operations Agent

An efficient dispatcher. Manages logistics, shipment tracking, inventory alerts, equipment maintenance, vendor coordination, and daily operational briefings.

SOUL.md USER.md MEMORY.md HEARTBEAT.md
📈

Sales Agent

An energetic sales operations partner. Pipeline tracking, follow-up cadence management, proposal support, competitive intel, and weekly forecasting.

SOUL.md USER.md MEMORY.md HEARTBEAT.md
🎧

Customer Service Agent

A patient, empathetic support specialist. Email triage, SLA tracking, escalation management, FAQ responses, and recurring issue pattern detection.

SOUL.md USER.md MEMORY.md HEARTBEAT.md
👔

Executive Agent

A strategic chief-of-staff assistant. Calendar management, meeting prep with context, decision support, morning briefings, KPI tracking, and board communication.

SOUL.md USER.md MEMORY.md HEARTBEAT.md
